heading: Employees of nonappropriated fund instrumentalities: senior executive pay levels
label: 1587a Employees of nonappropriated fund instrumentalities: senior executive pay levels

children.heading: .—Authority
children.label: a .—Authority
children.text: To achieve the objective stated in subsection (b), the Secretary of Defense may regulate the amount of total compensation that is provided for senior executives of nonappropriated fund instrumentalities who, for the fixing of pay by administrative action, are under the jurisdiction of the Secretary of Defense or the Secretary of a military department.

children.heading: .—Pay Parity
children.label: b .—Pay Parity
children.text: The objective of an action taken with respect to the compensation of senior executives under subsection (a) is to provide for parity between the total compensation provided for such senior executives and total compensation that is provided for Department of Defense employees in Senior Executive Service positions or other senior executive positions.

children.heading: .—Standards of Comparability
children.label: c .—Standards of Comparability
children.text: Subject to subsection (d), the Secretary of Defense shall prescribe the standards of comparison that are to apply in the making of the determinations necessary to achieve the objective stated in subsection (b).

children.heading: .—Establishment of Pay Rates
children.label: d .—Establishment of Pay Rates
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall apply subsections (a) and (b) of in the regulation of compensation under this section.section 5382 of title 5

children.heading: .—Relationship to Pay Limitation
children.label: e .—Relationship to Pay Limitation
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may exercise the authority provided in subsection (a) without regard to .section 5373 of title 5
The term “compensation” includes rate of basic pay.
The term “Senior Executive Service position” has the meaning given such term in .section 3132 of title 5
